subcodes.first_line: O thou glowing candle! The lights of sanctity are shining forth from every direction, and the mysteries of divine unity are dawning upon the horizons [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شمع مشتعل انوار تقدیس از هر جهت در اشراق است و اسرار توحید مشرق بر آفاق
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
